creator: thomas.lotterer@cw.com
text:
# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	lmtp2nntp
#	lmtp2nntp/pkg-plist
#	lmtp2nntp/pkg-descr
#	lmtp2nntp/pkg-comment
#	lmtp2nntp/distinfo
#	lmtp2nntp/Makefile
#
echo c - lmtp2nntp
mkdir -p lmtp2nntp > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - lmtp2nntp/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >lmtp2nntp/pkg-plist << 'END-of-lmtp2nntp/pkg-plist'
Xsbin/lmtp2nntp
END-of-lmtp2nntp/pkg-plist
echo x - lmtp2nntp/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >lmtp2nntp/pkg-descr << 'END-of-lmtp2nntp/pkg-descr'
XThe OSSP lmtp2nntp program is an LMTP service for use in
Xconjunction with an MTA (like Sendmail), providing a reli-
Xable real-time mail to news gateway. Input messages get
Xtheir headers slightly reformatted to match Usenet news
Xarticle format. The article is then posted or feeded into
Xa remote NNTP service (like INN). Delivery must take place
Ximmediately or the transaction fails. OSSP lmtp2nntp
Xrelies on the queuing capabilities of the MTA in order to
Xprovide a fully reliable service.  For this the program
Xreturns proper delivery status notification which indi-
Xcates successful completed action, persistent transient
Xfailure or permanent failure.
X
XWWW: http://www.ossp.org/
X
X--
Xthomas.lotterer@cw.com
END-of-lmtp2nntp/pkg-descr
echo x - lmtp2nntp/pkg-comment
sed 's/^X//' >lmtp2nntp/pkg-comment << 'END-of-lmtp2nntp/pkg-comment'
XOSSP mail to news gateway
END-of-lmtp2nntp/pkg-comment
echo x - lmtp2nntp/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >lmtp2nntp/distinfo << 'END-of-lmtp2nntp/distinfo'
XMD5 (lmtp2nntp-1.1b4.tar.gz) = 0985dce9778068fb4af9215103c245ef
END-of-lmtp2nntp/distinfo
echo x - lmtp2nntp/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >lmtp2nntp/Makefile << 'END-of-lmtp2nntp/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	lmtp2nntp
X# Date created:				8 November 2001
X# Whom:	      				Thomas Lotterer <thomas.lotterer@cw.com>
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	lmtp2nntp
XPORTVERSION=	1.1b4
XCATEGORIES=	mail
XMASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.ossp.org/pkg/lmtp2nntp/
X
XMAINTAINER=	thomas.lotterer@cw.com
X
XMAN8=           lmtp2nntp.8
XMANCOMPRESSED=  no
XHAS_CONFIGURE=  yes
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-lmtp2nntp/Makefile
exit
